description: APC injection using direct NT syscalls from ntdll.dll. RC4-encrypted shellcode (16-byte key). Resolves NT functions via GetProcAddress on ntdll. Anti-debugging via NtQueryInformationProcess checking ProcessDebugPort (info class 7). Enumerates threads with CreateToolhelp32Snapshot, suspends a target thread, allocates RWX memory via NtAllocateVirtualMemory, writes decrypted shellcode via NtWriteVirtualMemory, queues APC via NtQueueApcThread, and triggers via NtAlertResumeThread. Synthetic/safe — targets self with harmless shellcode.
